name: Tank VS Zombies
author: Poki
description: Zombies are here! Get ready to fight back in Tank VS Zombies! In this puzzle shooting game, you'll have to be strategic and use as little shots from your tank as possible to take out all of the zombies in each level. The less shots you take, the more stars and money you will earn! There's 200 levels to complete and 14 different tanks to unlock. Don't worry if you get stuck, you can always ask for a helping hand to continue on. Can you take the world back from the zombies? How to play Tank VS Zombies? Use the mouse or drag your finger to aim and shoot! Who created Tank VS Zombies? Tank VS Zombies was created by KibagaOrg. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Tank VS Zombies for free? You can play Tank VS Zombies for free on Poki. Can I play Tank VS Zombies on mobile devices and desktop? Tank VS Zombies can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
